fever.diet: Light food like khichdi, soup, and lots of fluids. Avoid oily food.
fever.precautions: If fever exceeds 102°F or lasts more than 3 days, see a doctor immediately.

home_remedies: Rest in a dark quiet room
headache.diet: Avoid caffeine and processed food. Eat magnesium-rich foods like spinach and almonds.
headache.precautions: Sudden severe headache with vision changes requires immediate medical attention.

chest pain.precautions: ⚠️ Chest pain can be serious. Call 102 if pain spreads to arm/jaw or with breathing difficulty.

home_remedies: Warm water with honey and ginger
cough.diet: Warm soups, herbal tea, avoid cold drinks and ice cream.
cough.precautions: If cough persists beyond 2 weeks or has blood, consult a doctor.

cold.diet: Warm fluids, chicken soup, vitamin C rich fruits like oranges.
cold.precautions: Rest well and avoid cold exposure. Usually resolves in 5-7 days.

sore throat.diet: Warm liquids, soft foods, avoid spicy and cold items.
sore throat.precautions: If accompanied by high fever or difficulty swallowing, see a doctor.

rash.diet: Avoid allergens, eat anti-inflammatory foods like turmeric and green vegetables.
rash.precautions: If rash spreads rapidly or has fever, consult dermatologist immediately.

stomach pain.diet: Bland food like rice, banana, toast. Avoid spicy and oily food.
stomach pain.precautions: Severe or persistent pain needs medical attention.

nausea.diet: Dry crackers, bananas, rice. Avoid strong smells and fatty food.
nausea.precautions: If accompanied by severe vomiting or dehydration, see a doctor.

vomiting.diet: Clear fluids first, then bland foods. Avoid dairy and spicy food.
vomiting.precautions: Persistent vomiting can cause dehydration. Seek help if it continues over 24 hours.

dizziness.diet: Iron-rich food, avoid skipping meals, stay hydrated.
dizziness.precautions: Frequent dizziness may indicate low BP or other issues. Consult doctor.

breathing difficulty.precautions: ⚠️ This is serious. Call 102 or go to emergency immediately.

back pain.diet: Calcium and vitamin D rich foods like milk, eggs, leafy greens.
back pain.precautions: Persistent back pain or numbness in legs needs medical evaluation.

joint pain.diet: Omega-3 rich foods, avoid processed food, include ginger and garlic.
joint pain.precautions: Persistent joint swelling requires consultation with orthopedic.

fatigue.diet: Balanced diet with proteins, iron, and B12. Avoid junk food.
fatigue.precautions: Chronic fatigue may indicate underlying condition. Get blood tests done.

body ache.diet: Hydration, magnesium-rich foods like bananas and nuts.
body ache.precautions: If accompanied by high fever, could be viral. Consult doctor.

diarrhea.diet: BRAT diet - Banana, Rice, Applesauce, Toast. Avoid dairy and spicy food.
diarrhea.precautions: Watch for dehydration. If blood in stool or severe, see doctor immediately.

acidity.diet: Avoid spicy, oily, and citrus foods. Eat small frequent meals.
acidity.precautions: Chronic acidity needs medical evaluation for GERD.

anxiety.diet: Avoid caffeine and alcohol. Include omega-3 and magnesium rich foods.
anxiety.precautions: If interfering with daily life, please consult a mental health professional.

insomnia.diet: Avoid caffeine after 4 PM. Chamomile tea can help.
insomnia.precautions: Chronic insomnia affects health. Consult doctor if persists over 2 weeks.

eye pain.diet: Vitamin A rich foods like carrots, spinach, and eggs.
eye pain.precautions: Sudden vision changes or severe pain needs immediate ophthalmologist visit.

ear pain.diet: Normal diet with immunity boosters like vitamin C.
ear pain.precautions: Do not insert anything in ear. See ENT if pain persists.

tooth pain.diet: Soft foods, avoid very hot/cold/sweet items.
tooth pain.precautions: See dentist ASAP. Ignoring can lead to serious infection.
